001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.type.DigSiteSquareState;
006import java.util.Collection;
007import java.util.List;
008import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
009
010/**
011 * Repository interface for managing dig site square data. Provides asynchronous and observable
012 * methods for retrieving, inserting, and updating game board squares.
013 */
014public interface DigSiteSquareRepository {
015
016  /**
017   * Retrieves all dig site squares for a specific grid as observable live data.
018   *
019   * @param gridId Grid ID.
020   * @return LiveData containing list of all squares in the specified grid.
021   */
022  LiveData<List<DigSiteSquare>> getAllByGridId(long gridId);
023
024  /**
025   * Inserts a batch of dig site squares into the database asynchronously.
026   *
027   * @param squares Collection of squares to insert.
028   * @return CompletableFuture containing list of generated primary key IDs.
029   */
030  CompletableFuture<List<Long>> insertBatch(Collection<DigSiteSquare> squares);
031
032  /**
033   * Updates a single dig site square asynchronously.
034   *
035   * @param square Square to update.
036   * @return CompletableFuture containing the number of rows updated (should be 1).
037   */
038  CompletableFuture<Integer> update(DigSiteSquare square);
039
040  /**
041   * Updates multiple dig site squares in a batch operation asynchronously.
042   *
043   * @param squares Collection of squares to update.
044   * @return CompletableFuture containing the number of rows updated.
045   */
046  CompletableFuture<Integer> updateBatch(Collection<DigSiteSquare> squares);
047
048  /**
049   * Updates the state of a dig site square identified by its coordinates asynchronously.
050   *
051   * @param gridId Grid ID.
052   * @param x X coordinate.
053   * @param y Y coordinate.
054   * @param state New square state.
055   * @return CompletableFuture that completes when the update is done.
056   */
057  CompletableFuture<Void> updateStateByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y, DigSiteSquareState state);
058
059  /**
060   * Retrieves the state of a dig site square by its coordinates asynchronously.
061   *
062   * @param gridId Grid ID.
063   * @param x X coordinate.
064   * @param y Y coordinate.
065   * @return CompletableFuture containing the square state, or {@code null} if not found.
066   */
067  CompletableFuture<DigSiteSquareState> getStateByCoordinates(long gridId, int x, int y);
068
069}
